name: Apple
interviewFormat: Multiple rounds: 2-3 technical phone screens, 5-6 onsite (deep technical dives per team, manager round, director round)
questionPatterns: walk me through your most technically challenging project end-to-end
how did you ensure quality in X project
design a system where reliability is critical
tell me about a time your attention to detail caught a major bug
how do you approach performance optimisation
redFlags: not knowing your own code deeply
